personas.name: Engaged and Hopeful User
personas.description: A user who actively uses the app to track their mood and emotions, and finds it helpful in managing their mental health.
goals: to understand and manage their mental health
to track their emotions and moods
context: is looking for a tool to help them manage their emotions
constraints: may not have a lot of money to spend on premium features

personas.name: Frustrated Technical User
personas.description: A user who experiences technical issues with the app and is frustrated with the limitations of the free version.
goals: to use the app without technical issues
to access premium features without paying
constraints: may not have a lot of patience for technical issues
may not want to pay for premium features

personas.name: Critical and Skeptical User
personas.description: A user who is skeptical of the app's ability to evaluate mental health and may not find it useful.
goals: to find a reliable and trustworthy mental health tool
context: may have had negative experiences with mental health tools
is skeptical of the app's claims
constraints: may not be willing to pay for premium features

personas.name: Mental Health Journeyer
personas.description: A user who is on a mental health journey and is using the app to track their emotions and moods.
goals: to understand and manage their mental health
to track their emotions and moods
context: is on a mental health journey
is looking for a tool to help them manage their emotions
constraints: may not have a lot of money to spend on premium features

personas.name: Limited Feature Seeker
personas.description: A user who is looking for a mental health tool with more features and is limited by the app's free version.
goals: to find a mental health tool with more features
context: may have had negative experiences with mental health tools
is looking for a tool with more features
constraints: may not be willing to pay for premium features
